parsed.production_notes: The video combines a human-recorded actor in the bottom panel with an AI-generated 3D avatar in the top panel, along with animated app screencasts, making it a mixed-media production.

characters.appearance: A stylized 3D animated woman of Indian descent in her mid-20s. She has a warm, medium complexion, large expressive brown eyes, and perfectly sculpted eyebrows. Her hair is long, black, and styled in voluminous waves parted to the side.
characters.wardrobe: A bright turquoise or cyan blazer worn over a plain white crew-neck top.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, professional, and consistently smiling.

characters.appearance: A young South Indian man in his early 20s with a medium build and a dark complexion. He has thick, curly black hair styled upwards and a light mustache. His facial features are round.
characters.wardrobe: A long-sleeved, button-down collared shirt with a brown, blue, and white plaid pattern.
characters.demeanor: Initially hesitant, confused, and slightly stressed, transitioning to attentive, curious, and finally convinced and decisive.

scenes.setting: A split-screen setup. The top panel has an abstract purple and blue digital background. The bottom panel is a modern office pantry or kitchen with white walls, a countertop, and a water cooler.
scenes.camera: Split-screen with two medium close-ups (talking heads).

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character A, a stylized 3D animated woman with a warm skin tone and large brown eyes. She has long, wavy, dark hair parted to the side. She is smiling warmly and looking directly forward. She is wearing a bright blue blazer over a white top. The background is an abstract digital design with purple and blue gradients and subtle geometric patterns. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting her features.

A medium close-up of Character B, a young South Indian man, looking directly at the camera with a confused and slightly stressed expression. He has dark, curly hair styled high on his head, a light mustache, and a medium build. He is wearing a brown and blue plaid button-down shirt. He is seated in what appears to be an office pantry or modern kitchen, with white cabinets, a countertop, and a large water dispenser visible in the background. The lighting is neutral and appears to be from an overhead source.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical split-screen video. The top panel shows a friendly AI avatar (Character A) against a digital background. The bottom panel shows a real person (Character B) in an office setting, looking confused. Animated captions appear over the video, synchronized with the speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: I... will to learn English. I... uh... having interview tomorrow.

Character A says: Do you want to learn English speaking?

Character B says: Yes. But... lekin aap Hindi mein baat kar sakte ho? [But... can you speak in Hindi?]

Character A says: Zaroor. Aapko Angrezi seekhni hai? [Of course. Do you want to learn English?]

Character B says: Haan, main Angrezi seekhna chahta hun. Par mere paas time aur paisa zyada nahi hai. Aur main Hindi medium se hoon. [Yes, I want to learn English. But I don't have much time or money. And I am from a Hindi medium background.]
scenes.on_screen_text: I... | will to learn | English. | I...uh... | having interview | tomorrow. | Do you want to | learn English | speaking? | Yes. | but | lekin aap Hindi | mein baat kar | sakte ho? | Zaroor. | Aapko Angrezi | seekhni hai? | Haan | main Angrezi | seekhna chahta | hun. | par mere paas | time aur paisa | zyada nahi hai. | aur main Hindi | medium se hoon.

scenes.camera: Split-screen with two medium close-ups (talking heads).

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character A, a stylized 3D animated woman with a warm skin tone and large brown eyes. She has long, wavy, dark hair parted to the side. She is smiling brightly and speaking with an encouraging expression. She is wearing a bright blue blazer over a white top. The background is an abstract digital design with purple and blue gradients.

A medium close-up of Character B, a young South Indian man, looking directly forward with a neutral, attentive expression. He has dark, curly hair styled high on his head and a light mustache. He is wearing a brown and blue plaid button-down shirt. He is seated in an office pantry setting with white cabinets and a countertop in the background.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen format continues. Character A explains the app's benefits. The 'MySivi' logo briefly appears over the video. Animated captions continue to appear.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: MySivi try karo. Roz sirf 10-15 minute mere saath English practice karo aur ek mahine mein aap achhi English bolne lagoge. [Try MySivi. Just practice English with me for 10-15 minutes daily and in one month, you will start speaking good English.]

Character B says: Isme teacher kaun hoga? [Who will be the teacher in this?]
scenes.on_screen_text: MySivi | try karo. | Roz sirf 10-15 | minute mere saath | English practice | karo | aur ek mahine | mein aap achhi | English bolne | lagoge. | Isme teacher | kaun hoga?

scenes.setting: App UI screencast on a smartphone.

panels.panel_visual_description: A screencast of a mobile application interface on a smartphone. The screen shows a chat conversation with a robot avatar. The user has typed 'I go to the beach and eat ice cream.' The app responds with a correction: 'Almost perfect! Just a small correction: I went to the beach and ate ice cream.' The words 'went' and 'ate' are highlighted. The app has a clean, light-purple and white design aesthetic.

scenes.visual_description: A series of quick cuts showing the app's UI. First, the main 'Learning Path' screen, then a chat interface demonstrating instant grammar correction. The split-screen of the two characters appears briefly in between the UI shots. Character A's voiceover explains the features.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Mere jaise AI teachers step-by-step English speaking sikhayenge. Galtiyan turant correct karenge aur kabhi judge nahi karenge. [AI teachers like me will teach English speaking step-by-step. They will correct mistakes instantly and will never judge.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Mere jaise AI | teachers step | by step English | speaking sikhayenge. | Galatiyan turant | correct karenge | aur kabhi judge | nahi karenge.

scenes.camera: Split-screen with two medium close-ups (talking heads).

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of the smiling 3D animated woman, Character A. She looks directly at the camera with a pleasant and confident expression. She is wearing her blue blazer and white top against the abstract purple background.
A medium close-up of the young South Indian man, Character B. He nods in agreement and has a slight smile, looking convinced. He is wearing his plaid shirt in the office pantry setting.

scenes.visual_description: The video returns to the split-screen conversation. Character B nods, convinced by the app's features.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Hmm. Ab yeh sahi lag raha. [Hmm. Now this seems right.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Hmm. | ab yeh sahi lag | raha.

scenes.setting: Split screen with app UI overlays.

panels.panel_visual_description: A vertical split-screen video. The top panel shows the smiling 3D animated woman, Character A. The bottom panel shows the young South Indian man, Character B, listening attentively. Both are in a medium close-up.

A screencast of a mobile application's premium subscription page. The page has a dark blue background with a prominent offer for '3 days of Premium benefits for ₹3'. Below this, there are three green boxes highlighting features like '24/7 AI English Teacher', '500+ Exercises and Lessons', and 'Unlimited Access'.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen continues, but app UI screens are overlaid on top. First, the Google Play Store page for 'MySivi' is shown. Then, a screen showing a limited-time offer for a 3-rupee trial is displayed. Character A's voiceover explains the offer.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Aaj hi MySivi app download karo. 50 lakh se zyada log roz yaha English practice karte. Sirf 3 rupay ke trial se shuru karo aur apni English ko next level par le jao. [Download the MySivi app today. More than 50 lakh people practice English here daily. Start with just a 3 rupee trial and take your English to the next level.]
scenes.on_screen_text: MySivi | Aaj hi MySivi | app download | karo. | 50 lakh se zyada | log roj yaha English | practice karte | Sirf 3 rupay ke | trial se shuru | karo | aur apni | English ko next | level par le jao.

scenes.setting: Split screen with app download overlay.
scenes.camera: Split-screen with two medium close-ups (talking heads).

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of the smiling 3D animated woman, Character A, against her purple digital background. Her head is partially obscured by a graphic overlay.

A medium close-up of the young South Indian man, Character B. He is now looking down at a smartphone in his hands, his expression focused as he interacts with the screen. He is in the same office pantry setting.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen format returns. Character B looks down and starts using his phone. An overlay showing the app downloading and installing from the Play Store appears over the top half of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Abhi main phone mein download karta hun MySivi app. [I'll download the MySivi app on my phone right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Abhi main phone | mein download | karta hun | MySivi app.

scenes.setting: Abstract purple/blue digital background with glowing hexagonal patterns.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up, full-screen shot of Character A, the stylized 3D animated woman. She is smiling warmly and looking directly at the camera. She is wearing her bright blue blazer over a white top. The background is an abstract digital design with purple and blue gradients and glowing hexagonal patterns.

scenes.visual_description: The video cuts to a full-screen shot of Character A, who delivers the final call to action directly to the viewer.
